title: DesignContextPin
description: A pin binding a [`DesignContextPack`] to the identity that produced it: a model id and a graph/revision marker, plus a stable content hash. A pinned context can be referenced and re-verified later without re-running selection.

design_system_id.description: The design system the pinned pack was selected from.

graph_revision.description: The graph or design revision this context was pinned at.

model_id.description: The model id this context was pinned for.

pack_hash.description: Stable `fnv1a64:` digest over the pin identity and the pack body.
